channel.title: Website on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Website on Nature Works

item.title: Website
item.description:
After a blip, regular blogging service has now been resumed

The website has been on hold for a couple of weeks. http://localhost:1313/blog/230429-website/

item.title: RSS
item.description:
I’ve managed to create my RSS feed, so know my blog posts will automatically appear on Facebook & Mastodon. Which is nice.

More noodling to streamline my publishing. Firstly, I’m using Buffer and BulkBuffer to automate my social media posts across Facebook, Mastodon and Google Maps Business. http://localhost:1313/blog/230211-rss/

item.title: Grow your own website
item.description:
Advice on how to set up a website for an organisation, as promised to Teresa Filipponi at the Hub Cymru Africa permaculture event at Botanic Garden Wales!

Jumping on the website and social media bandwagon is difficult if you don’t have the technical experience or the budget. http://localhost:1313/blog/grow-your-own-website/
